{{Infobox character
| name = Hollow King
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Hollow King]] is [[Ozmanthus]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Jai Chen]]'s [[Path]] includes [[Hollow King]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Hollow King]] swept three [[Monarchs]] aside with a sweep of his cloak and a thrust of his spear.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
